fields.name: dataset_id
fields.description: Stable identifier used to join to other metadata files. Prefer a DOI when available; otherwise use a stable local identifier.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Human-readable dataset title.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Short description of the dataset contents and purpose.

fields.name: creator
fields.description: Name(s) of dataset creator(s), team, or originating project/program.

fields.name: contact_name
fields.description: Primary inquiry contact, such as a person, team, or office.

fields.name: contact_email
fields.description: Contact email address for the inquiry contact.

fields.name: license
fields.description: License name or URL.

fields.name: contact_org
fields.description: Organization for contact_name. Leave blank if already clear from contact_name or creator.

fields.name: contact_position
fields.description: Role or title for contact_name, mainly useful when contact_name is an individual.

fields.name: temporal_start
fields.description: Start date or year covered by the dataset.

fields.name: temporal_end
fields.description: End date or year covered by the dataset.

fields.name: spatial_extent
fields.description: Textual description of spatial coverage.

fields.name: dataset_type
fields.description: High-level dataset type.

fields.name: source_citation
fields.description: Citation for reports, publications, source databases, or internal documentation.

fields.name: update_frequency
fields.description: Planned update cadence.

fields.name: topic_categories
fields.description: Semicolon-separated ISO 19115 topic categories for discovery classification.

fields.name: keywords
fields.description: Semicolon-separated free-text discovery keywords; avoid repeating topic_categories verbatim.

fields.name: security_classification
fields.description: Dataset security classification.

fields.name: provenance_note
fields.description: Narrative about data lineage.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Timestamp when the dataset was created.

fields.name: modified
fields.description: Timestamp when the dataset was last modified.

fields.name: spec_version
fields.description: SDP specification version.
